images.alt: Carbon lattice gripping bottle on factory floor

meta_description: Elements that can impact the cost of your 3D printed parts to help you make smarter, cost-saving decisions before you start production.

sections.heading: Breaking Down the Costs of 3D Printing
sections.text: Breaking Down the Costs of 3D Printing Published on July 29, 2021 Originally published on fastradius.com on July 29, 2021 If you ask a 3D printing manufacturer, “how much does it cost to 3D print a part?” the answer will most likely be “it depends.” The manufacturer isn’t trying to be mysterious — there are many different factors that go into generating an accurate quote. This article will shed some light on the elements that can impact the cost of your 3D printed parts to help you make smarter, cost-saving decisions before you start production. Here are some of the major cost drivers in 3D printing. Part volumes and nestability The cost of each print is distributed across however many part...
